commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh All the ends of the world shall remember and turn unto the LORD: and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before you. Augustine of Hippo 28. "All the borders of the earth shall remember themselves, and be turned to the Lord" (ver. They shall remember themselves: for, by the Gentiles, born in death and bent on outward things, God had been forgotten; and then shall all the borders of the earth be turned to the Lord. "And all the kindreds of the nations shall worship in His sight. " And all the kindreds of the nations shall worship in their own consciences.
